lparmy_dca_bid_ask.name: DCA Bid-Ask
lparmy_dca_bid_ask.author: lparmy

token_criteria.notes: High-volatility memecoins with strong narrative and active community. Volatility > 3, organic > 70, fee_tvl_ratio > 0.3. Must have real community (not just bots).

entry.condition: Deploy SOL-only bid-ask below active bin to DCA into the token on dips
entry.notes: Use amount_y only, amount_x=0, bins_above=0. Wide range covering -70% pullback. As price drops through bins, SOL converts to token (DCA in). If price bounces, you keep SOL + earned fees.

range.notes: Cover maximum downside. Use 50-75 bins below for volatile tokens. Wider = safer but lower capital efficiency per bin.

exit.notes: Close on trailing TP, stop-loss, or sustained OOR. If price pumps far above range, consider closing in profit. If OOR downside and token still has volume, consider re-deploying at new lower level.

lparmy_dca_bid_ask.best_for: Most popular LPArmy strategy: DCA into volatile tokens via single-sided SOL bid-ask while earning fees on every price movement through your range.

lparmy_spot_range.name: Spot Range
lparmy_spot_range.author: lparmy

token_criteria.notes: Choppy or sideways tokens with consistent volume. Lower volatility (1-4). Good organic score. Established tokens preferred over new launches.

entry.condition: Deploy SOL with balanced spot range around the active bin for uniform fee capture
entry.notes: Spot distributes liquidity uniformly. Best when you're unsure of direction. Covers both upside and downside movement equally.

range.notes: 60/40 split favoring downside. Keeps you in range longer during both pumps and dumps. Reduces OOR exits vs downside-only strategies.

exit.notes: Close on trailing TP, stop-loss, or sustained OOR. Spot positions tend to stay in range longer, so be more patient with yield checks.

lparmy_spot_range.best_for: LPArmy default for uncertain markets: uniform distribution captures fees regardless of price direction. Lower risk, steady yield.

lparmy_curve_stable.name: Curve Stable
lparmy_curve_stable.author: lparmy

token_criteria.notes: Low-volatility pairs, stablecoin pairs, or established tokens in tight ranges. Volatility < 2. High volume relative to TVL.

entry.condition: Deploy with curve distribution concentrated around active bin for maximum capital efficiency
entry.notes: Curve puts most liquidity near the center, maximizing fees when price stays near current level. Best for range-bound tokens.

range.notes: Tight symmetric range. Use fewer total bins (20-35) for maximum concentration. Higher fees per trade but higher OOR risk.

exit.notes: Lower TP target but higher hit rate. Close quickly on OOR since curve positions lose efficiency fast when price moves away from center.

lparmy_curve_stable.best_for: LPArmy capital efficiency play: concentrated curve for stable/low-vol pairs maximizes fee capture per unit of capital deployed.

lparmy_sawtooth_bidask.name: Sawtooth Bid-Ask
lparmy_sawtooth_bidask.author: lparmy

token_criteria.notes: Trending-down tokens with active volume where you want to accumulate. Must still have real community and narrative. Avoid dead tokens.

entry.condition: Deploy SOL-only bid-ask below active bin. On OOR downside, re-deploy at new lower level instead of closing
entry.notes: Progressive DCA strategy. Each re-deploy creates a new 'tooth' at a lower price level. You accumulate more token at better prices while earning fees at each level.

range.notes: Moderate range (35-50 bins below). Not too wide so you get meaningful fee density. Re-deploy handles the wider coverage through progression.

exit.notes: On OOR downside: close_position(skip_swap=true) then redeploy at new lower level. Full exit only after 3+ re-seeds with declining fees, or when token volume dies. This is a multi-cycle strategy.

lparmy_sawtooth_bidask.best_for: LPArmy advanced: progressive DCA through multiple bid-ask levels. Each level earns fees while building a position at progressively lower prices.

lparmy_volatility_hunter.name: Volatility Hunter
lparmy_volatility_hunter.author: lparmy

token_criteria.notes: Explosive pools with volatility > 4, fee_tvl_ratio > 0.5, organic > 75. Must have strong volume and real narrative. Launch/hype phase tokens with genuine community.

entry.condition: Deploy SOL-only bid-ask on high-volatility pools with proven fee generation
entry.notes: Only enter when dynamic fees are elevated (volatility > 4 triggers higher Meteora dynamic fees). Use amount_y only, bins_above=0. Wider bin steps (100-125) preferred for fee capture.

range.notes: All liquidity below active bin. Use 45-65 bins below. Higher volatility = more bins for coverage. Wider range compensates for violent swings.

exit.notes: Trailing TP with tight trailing drop (1.5%). These positions generate fees fast but can reverse quickly. Take profits early and re-deploy. Close immediately if volatility drops below 2 (fees dry up).

lparmy_volatility_hunter.best_for: LPArmy fee farming: hunt high-volatility pools where dynamic fees spike. Fast in, fast out. The winning strategy from performance data (Ball-SOL: +1.84%, volatility 5.32).

custom_ratio_spot.name: Custom Ratio Spot
custom_ratio_spot.author: vipera

token_criteria.notes: Any token. Ratio expresses directional bias.

entry.condition: Directional view on token
entry.notes: 75% token = bullish (sell on pump out of range). 75% SOL = bearish/DCA-in (buy on dip). Set bins_below:bins_above proportional to ratio.

range.notes: bins_below:bins_above ratio matches token:SOL ratio. E.g., 75% token → ~52 bins below, ~17 bins above.

exit.notes: Close when OOR or TP hit. Re-deploy with updated ratio based on new momentum signals.

custom_ratio_spot.best_for: Expressing directional bias while earning fees both ways

single_sided_reseed.name: Single-Sided Bid-Ask + Re-seed
single_sided_reseed.author: vipera

token_criteria.notes: Volatile tokens with strong narrative. Must have active volume.

entry.condition: Deploy token-only (amount_x only, amount_y=0) bid-ask, bins below active bin only
entry.notes: As price drops through bins, token sold for SOL. Bid-ask concentrates at bottom edge.

range.notes: All bins below active bin. bins_above=0.

exit.notes: When OOR downside: close_position(skip_swap=true) → redeploy token-only bid-ask at new lower price. Do NOT swap to SOL. Full close only when token dead or after N re-seeds with declining performance.

single_sided_reseed.best_for: Riding volatile tokens down without cutting losses. DCA out via LP.

fee_compounding.name: Fee Compounding
fee_compounding.author: vipera

token_criteria.notes: Stable volume pools with consistent fee generation.

entry.condition: Deploy normally with any shape
entry.notes: Strategy is about management, not entry shape.

range.notes: Standard range for the pair.

exit.notes: When unclaimed fees > $5 AND in range: claim_fees → add_liquidity back into same position. Normal close rules otherwise.

fee_compounding.best_for: Maximizing yield on stable, range-bound pools via compounding

multi_layer.name: Multi-Layer
multi_layer.author: vipera

token_criteria.notes: High volume pools. Layer multiple shapes into ONE position via addLiquidityByStrategy to sculpt a composite distribution.

entry.condition: Create ONE position, then layer additional shapes onto it with add-liquidity. Each layer adds a different strategy/shape to the same position, compositing them.
entry.notes: Step 1: deploy (creates position with first shape). Step 2+: add-liquidity to same position with different shapes. All layers share the same bin range but different distribution curves stack on top of each other.

example_patterns.smooth_edge: Deploy Bid-Ask (edges) → add-liquidity Spot (fills the middle gap). 2 layers, 1 position.
example_patterns.full_composite: Deploy Bid-Ask (edges) → add-liquidity Spot (middle) → add-liquidity Curve (center boost). 3 layers, 1 position.
example_patterns.edge_heavy: Deploy Bid-Ask → add-liquidity Bid-Ask again (double edge weight). 2 layers, 1 position.

range.notes: All layers share the position's bin range (set at deploy). Choose range wide enough for the widest layer needed.

exit.notes: Single position — one close, one claim. The composite shape means fees earned reflect ALL layers combined.

multi_layer.best_for: Creating custom liquidity distributions by stacking shapes in one position. Single position to manage.

partial_harvest.name: Partial Harvest
partial_harvest.author: vipera

token_criteria.notes: High fee pools where taking profit incrementally is preferred.

entry.condition: Deploy normally
entry.notes: Strategy is about progressive profit-taking, not entry.

range.notes: Standard range.

exit.notes: When total return >= 10% of deployed capital: withdraw_liquidity(bps=5000) to take 50% off. Remaining 50% keeps running. Repeat at next threshold.

partial_harvest.best_for: Locking in profits without fully exiting winning positions

single_sided_sol_bidask.name: Single-Sided SOL Bid-Ask
single_sided_sol_bidask.author: vipera

token_criteria.notes: Volatile SOL pairs with strong organic quality, active volume, and acceptable holder concentration.

entry.condition: Deploy SOL-only bid-ask below the active bin
entry.notes: Use amount_y only, keep amount_x=0, and set bins_above=0. This matches the current executor safety rules.

range.notes: All liquidity below active bin. Wider bins_below for higher volatility; upper bin remains at active bin.

exit.notes: Close on stop-loss, trailing TP, low yield after minimum age, sustained OOR, or pump far above range. Close handles fee claiming internally.

single_sided_sol_bidask.best_for: Current bot implementation: SOL-only entries on volatile pools while collecting fees through downside movement.

sol_spot_balanced_entry.name: SOL Spot Balanced Entry
sol_spot_balanced_entry.author: vipera

token_criteria.notes: Choppy or sideways SOL pairs with active volume and clean holder quality.

entry.condition: Deploy from SOL with a balanced spot range around the active bin
entry.notes: Use amount_y only when executor requires SOL-only. This strategy is intended to keep liquidity active sooner than downside-only bid-ask.

range.notes: Place most liquidity below active bin, but keep some upside coverage to reduce pumped-far-above-range exits.

exit.notes: Close on stop-loss, trailing TP, low yield after minimum age, or sustained OOR. Prefer this when downside-only ranges miss too many upward moves.

sol_spot_balanced_entry.best_for: Sideways/choppy pools where price can move both ways and downside-only ranges exit too early.

conservative_wide_bidask.name: Conservative Wide Bid-Ask
conservative_wide_bidask.author: vipera

token_criteria.notes: Higher quality pools only: stronger TVL, volume, organic score, and lower bot/top-holder concentration.

entry.condition: Deploy SOL-only bid-ask with wider downside coverage
entry.notes: Use amount_y only, amount_x=0, bins_above=0. Keep deploy size small and require better pool quality.

range.notes: Use the upper side of configured bins_below for wider coverage. Better for live or lower-frequency runs.

exit.notes: Close on stop-loss, trailing TP, sustained OOR, low yield after minimum age, or repeated weak fee generation.

conservative_wide_bidask.best_for: Live-conservative SOL-only entries where fewer but higher-quality positions are preferred.

bengshark_bidask_volatility.name: Bengshark Bid-Ask Volatility Play
bengshark_bidask_volatility.author: bengshark.sol

token_criteria.notes: Volatile meme coins or token pairs with high volume and high momentum. Avoid dead coins.

entry.condition: Deploy SOL-only Bid-Ask below the active bin with an asymmetric downside bias
entry.notes: Deploy Y (SOL) only. Focuses on setting deep buy walls to accumulate cheap tokens during rapid price dips, which can be profitably sold back during rebounds.

range.notes: Use a moderate/wide range (55-85 bins below) depending on current volatility. Covers sharp drops while keeping fee capture dense.

exit.notes: Exit on trailing TP or stop-loss. If price goes pumped far above range, withdraw and re-evaluate.

bengshark_bidask_volatility.best_for: Bengshark's asymmetric bid-ask setup: designed to absorb sharp down-trending sell pressure and lock in high yield on the recovery swings.

0xyunss_spot_balanced.name: Yunus Spot Balanced Play
0xyunss_spot_balanced.author: 0xyunss

token_criteria.notes: Stable or moderately sideways tokens with steady trading volume. Good for established pools.

entry.condition: Deploy from SOL with a balanced Spot range across the active bin for symmetric fee capture
entry.notes: Distributes liquidity uniformly around current price. Lower impermanent loss risk, stable yield.

range.notes: Balanced distribution with a slight downside bias to protect against short-term sell-offs while maintaining upside capture.

exit.notes: Close when take-profit target reached, stop-loss hit, or sustained OOR.

0xyunss_spot_balanced.best_for: 0xyunss's balanced Spot setup: steady, lower-frequency LPing on sideways token pairs to capture fees symmetrically with low impermanent loss.

eisbedog_momentum_bidask.name: 0xMegumii Momentum Bid-Ask
eisbedog_momentum_bidask.author: eisbedog

token_criteria.notes: Highly active and trending pools with massive daily volume. High fee/TVL ratio pools preferred.

entry.condition: Deploy SOL-only Bid-Ask close below active bin to capture peak-hour trading volume
entry.notes: Set up close to the active price line. This captures highest fee density during violent swing waves.

range.notes: Concentrated downside range. Use 45-65 bins below. Tight range ensures high fee rate per bin but requires closer monitoring.

exit.notes: Quick exit via trailing TP or stop-loss. High fee accumulation allows for lower TP target and faster rotation.

eisbedog_momentum_bidask.best_for: 0xMegumii's momentum bid-ask setup: concentrates liquidity tightly under the active price to maximize fee rate capture during peak hours.

evilpanda_technical_bounce.name: Evil Panda Technical Bounce Play
evilpanda_technical_bounce.author: evilpanda

token_criteria.notes: Tokens showing strong indicators of technical bounces (oversold RSI, testing Bollinger support). High volume, volatile.

entry.condition: Deploy concentrated Bid-Ask positions at technical support/resistance levels
entry.notes: Integrates with chart indicators like Supertrend and RSI. Enter when RSI indicates oversold (<30) to capture key bounce zones.

range.notes: Highly concentrated bins below active price. Focus on 40-55 bins. Concentrates liquidity exactly in expected rebound bins.

exit.notes: Exit quickly upon price rebound to resist impermanent loss. Take profit as soon as target hit, or on trailing TP.

evilpanda_technical_bounce.best_for: Evil Panda's advanced technical bounce play: times entry using chart indicators and concentrates liquidity at expected support levels to print high % return in a few hours.

0xyunss_bidask_sideways.name: Yunus Bid-Ask Play
0xyunss_bidask_sideways.author: 0xyunss

token_criteria.notes: Highly traded pools with dynamic volumes. Fast movements with active sideways patterns.

entry.condition: Deploy SOL-only Bid-Ask close below active bin to capture high-frequency trading
entry.notes: Enter when the token exhibits strong support and active trading to extract maximum fees from bid-ask churn.

range.notes: Moderate range (40-60 bins below active bin) to maintain fee density while avoiding fast out-of-range downside.

exit.notes: Close position on trailing profit target or if price falls below designated support walls.

0xyunss_bidask_sideways.best_for: 0xyunss's signature Bid-Ask setup: designed for sideways tokens to capture high-velocity fees while accumulating cheaply if it dips slightly.

0xyunss_curve_concentrated.name: Yunus Curve Concentrated Play
0xyunss_curve_concentrated.author: 0xyunss

token_criteria.notes: Sideways, low-volatility tokens or stable-trending pairs. Avoid high volatility pumps.

entry.condition: Deploy Curve shape with high center concentration around active bin
entry.notes: Curve shape maximizes efficiency in highly range-bound pools. Ideal for capturing high yields in a short period.

range.notes: Tight symmetric range (e.g., 20-30 bins around center) to stack capital where trades are most frequent.

exit.notes: Quick exit when the price starts drifting out of range, or yield declines. Re-invest to reset center bin.

0xyunss_curve_concentrated.best_for: 0xyunss's Curve strategy: optimal for range-bound sideways pools to achieve extreme capital efficiency and high fee returns.

eisbedog_bear_dlmm.name: 0xMegumii Bear Market DLMM Play
eisbedog_bear_dlmm.author: eisbedog

token_criteria.notes: Solid tokens/memes with strong historical rebound capacity in bear or slow markets.

entry.condition: Deploy deep single-sided SOL-only Bid-Ask to safely DCA on slow market pullbacks
entry.notes: Deploy Y (SOL) only. Focuses on setting ultra-wide buy walls to capture slow bleeding or panic sells in slow markets.

range.notes: Ultra-wide range (70-100 bins below active bin). Protects capital from fast downside while DCAing in safely.

exit.notes: Moderate TP threshold. Close immediately on market bounces or trailing TP. Swap accumulated tokens to SOL once in profit.

eisbedog_bear_dlmm.best_for: 0xMegumii's defensive Bear market setup: uses deep and wide bid-ask ranges to absorb slow market selling and earn consistent fees with minimal impermanent loss risk.

dynamic.name: Dynamic Strategy Selection Mode
dynamic.author: yunus
dynamic.best_for: Adaptively choosing the best LP strategy based on candidate volatilities.
